name: Dishwashing Pod Holder and Organizer - Brightroom™
description:
Streamline your dishwashing routine with this Dishwashing Pod Holder and Organizer from Brightroom™. Made of BPA-free plastic, this transparent organizer features a two-tier design that keeps your dishwashing pods neatly organized and easily accessible. The clear construction allows you to see your supply at a glance, making it simple to know when it's time to restock. Plus, the top tier can be used for storing scrubbers, small cleaning brushes and more.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
